feat_kriteron_solmosis_progression.name: Solmosis
feat_kriteron_solmosis_progression.description: Your connection with the Ourolight emboldens you! When you reach levels 1, 4, 8, 12, 16 and 19, permanently gain one Solmosis effect. You cannot choose an effect twice.

feat_sol_flight.name: Solmosis: Flight
feat_sol_flight.description: Wings sprout from your back. You have a base flying speed of 9 meters if you are not encumbered.

feat_sol_radiance.name: Solmosis: Golden Radiance
feat_sol_radiance.description: You can see in dim light within 18 meters of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it was dim light. You can’t discern color in darkness, only shades of gold.

feat_sol_aura.name: Solmosis: Flaming Aura
feat_sol_aura.description: Twice per short rest and as an action, you can choose to surround yourself with a flaming aura. You shed bright light in a 6-meter radius and dim light for 3 meters.

feat_sol_protector.name: Solmosis: Mark of the Protector
feat_sol_protector.description: Once per long rest and as a reaction, you can cast one of your prepared spells with a range of self on a willing creature within 9 meters of you.

feat_sol_crystal.name: Solmosis: Celestial Crystal
feat_sol_crystal.description: Once per long rest and as an action, you can touch a creature and cause it to regain a number of hit points equal to your level.

feat_fallen_res.name: Necrotic Resistance
feat_fallen_res.description: You have resistance to necrotic damage.

feat_fallen_black_sun.name: Black Sun
feat_fallen_black_sun.description: Your Solmosis effects become darker. Additionally, your Solmosis gains specific dark options.

feat_sol_eyes_dread.name: Eyes of Dread
feat_sol_eyes_dread.description: Twice per long rest and as an action, turn your eyes terrorizing for a minute. You have advantage on Charisma (Intimidation) checks.

feat_sol_skin_fallen.name: Skin of the Fallen
feat_sol_skin_fallen.description: When not wearing armor, you have a natural armor of 13.

feat_sol_exile_crown.name: Exile’s Crown
feat_sol_exile_crown.description: Starting at lvl 11. As an action, invoke a crown for 1 minute: you cannot be flanked and have advantage on your first attack every turn if no allies are within 6m.

feat_light_res.name: Radiant Resistance
feat_light_res.description: You have resistance to radiant damage.

feat_light_sunshine.name: Sunshine
feat_light_sunshine.description: Your Solmosis effects become brighter. Additionally, your Solmosis gains specific radiant options.

feat_sol_sunburst.name: Sunburst
feat_sol_sunburst.description: As a bonus action while Aura is active, pass effects to weapons. Gain 1.5m reach and deal additional radiant damage equal to @pb.

feat_sol_fourth_wing.name: Fourth Wing
feat_sol_fourth_wing.description: Two additional wings sprout. While flying you can perform the dash action as a bonus action.

feat_sol_protector_crown.name: Protector's Crown
feat_sol_protector_crown.description: Starting at lvl 11. As an action, invoke a crown for 1 minute: any allied creature within 3 meters gains +1 to its AC.

races.name: Kriteron
races.description: Descendants of celestial beings connected to the Ourolight.
races.biology: Kriteri are 1,50-2,50 meters tall, average 80 kg and are humanoids. Kriteri reach adulthood at the age of 50 but are considered young until the age of 120. On average, they live about 400 years.

subraces.name: Fallen
subraces.description: Exiled or forgotten celestials with broken light.
